title: The Archaic Artifacts Catalogue [More Magic Series]
description: Powerful artifacts for the toughest challenges
body:
# 📦 Installation
### Required
- Or-lib
- Spell Power Attributes
- More Spell Attributes
### Strongly Recommended
- Fallen Paladins and Priests
- Bards
- Druids
- Blood Mages
# 💎 Features
Grealty powerfull Artufacts to aid you in your more difficult challeges, exclusivly created for the More Magic Series! 

This is NOT a vanilla friendly mod, the bonuses that this artifacts offer are VERY powerful!


### Explore and loot!
In the chest all around the world you can find loot sack that can be opened to reveal an artifact!

# 🔧 Configuration
Trinkets bonuses are fully configurable, here the path to the config files:

- config/the_archaic_artifacts_catalogue/trinkets

And also loot chances are fully configurable, here the path to the config files:

- config/the_archaic_artifacts_catalogue/loot
